title: OSDUE Happy Birthday Cake Toppers, Rainbow Balloon Cloud Theme Party Decorations, Rainbow Balloon Figures Happy Birthday Banner Cake Decors, Birthday Shower Party Supplies
features: 【Beauty Rainbow Cake Toppers Set】Mini cake decorations can make your cake more interesting. You can let the family choose their favorite style to decorate the cake.

【Variety of Styles】Birthday cake decorations in different shapes and styles for family. Typical character cartoon avatars make your cakes more attractive. Restoration is very personal. You can prepare a unique cake for your family to celebrate according to your wishes and for different occasions.

【Safe and Environmentally Friendly】Our cake decorations are made of high-quality environmentally friendly PVC materials, and the cake decorations are made of plastic-coated cardboard, which is non-toxic and reusable. Great for decorating cakes and fruit dishes.Make the cake more fun and create a festive party atmosphere.

【Wide Range of Uses】Suitable for cake decoration, parties, theme weddings, festivals, baby showers, birthday parties, and can be used for decoration, teaching and other activities, and are loved by family. It can also be used as decorations to surprise the family.
【Perfect Gift】Not only ideal for decorating cakes and fruit bowls, but also home decorations. They are the gift of choice for little ones or adults who are enthusiastic and nostalgic.
